evals.prompt: Turn this creative review transcript into meeting notes: 'Lead said the dock religion feels too cute. Writer pushed back on timeline gap in act two. No decision on enemy name.'
evals.expected_output: Structured meeting note with filename first; no invented enemy name; action items only if source supports; promote_to hints if canon claims appear.

evals.prompt: Format these bullets as one atomic note: 'Foil stamp adds $2.40 per SKU. Vendor needs vector logo by Friday.'
evals.expected_output: Single atomic note; numerals preserved; no fabricated vendor name; definitive claims only.

evals.prompt: Store this research excerpt as an atomic note for later mood vault: 'Harbor fog photography uses desaturated blues, not teal gradients.'
evals.expected_output: Kebab-case filename; source tag; promote_to mood vault or none; passes retrieval simulation.
Declines or routes to notes mode; does not write bible doc end-to-end without explicit promotion pass.

assertions_notes: Grade against evals/quality-checks.md. Fail on fabricated metrics, names, or scaffold pasted into world/.
